rooms.label: 6c
rooms.name: Uktarl's Room
rooms.gm_note: Card game with marked deck. Dwarf-mountain fresco hides a stone key (DC 13 Perception) that opens the box in 14b. Coins on the table.

rooms.label: 6a
rooms.name: Hall of Three Lords
rooms.gm_note: Rally point: if alerted, all Undertakers (captain, six bandits, two doppelgangers) gather here to extort a toll. Broken white staff wails "Thief!" when mended and held.

rooms.name: Grell Hideout

monsters.name: Grell
monsters.note: hidden in north and east alcoves; pursue fleeing prey

rooms.gm_note: Black bone pillars give the grells cover. No treasure.

rooms.label: 6b
rooms.name: Rigged Secret Door
rooms.gm_note: Stacked plates crash when the door opens, alerting bandits in 6a, 6c, 6d.

rooms.name: With Sword in Hand
rooms.gm_note: Cursed glowing longsword in a stand (wielder cannot drop it). Ceiling vents carry distorted Waterdeep voices; Tiny creatures could escape through them.

rooms.name: Entrywell
rooms.gm_note: Rope drop from the Yawning Portal. A bandit watches through a secret spy-hole and retreats to warn area 6 when intruders arrive.

rooms.name: Empty Room
rooms.gm_note: Torch stubs and empty potion bottles; adventurers rest here.

rooms.label: 2a
rooms.name: Demon Reliefs
rooms.gm_note: Thirteen demon bas-reliefs. Kenku skeleton points at the nalfeshnee (secret door to 3). Dretch relief hides a second secret door to 4 with spy-hole eyes.

rooms.label: 2b
rooms.name: Pillar Forest

monsters.name: Bugbear
monsters.note: each hosts an intellect devourer; cannot be surprised; flee south to warn area 23

rooms.gm_note: Bugbears hide behind pillars and withdraw to alert Worg’s Eye. Harmless snake skeleton on north pillar; looted secret compartment in south pillar.

rooms.name: Hall of Mirrors

monsters.name: Shadow
monsters.note: construct duplicates; spawn when someone passes the two westernmost mirrors; vanish after 1 minute

rooms.gm_note: Sixteen niche mirrors, five magical. Three illusory mirrors hide shelves; one holds the bronze Halaster mask (50 gp) — the key to area 27.

rooms.label: 23a
rooms.name: Nimraith's Fate
rooms.gm_note: Part of Worg’s Eye watch post (2 bugbears + 15 goblins total; none can be surprised if warned).

rooms.label: 23b
rooms.name: Shattered Statue

monsters.name: Bugbear
monsters.note: each hosts an intellect devourer; cannot be surprised

rooms.gm_note: Bugbears reassemble a statue of three warriors (17 pieces). Devourers teleport out when a host drops.

rooms.name: Slanted Room

monsters.name: Gray Ooze
monsters.note: psychic variant; invisible underwater north of the statue

rooms.gm_note: Flooded, tilted sewer room. Sahuagin statue’s screw-off head hides a wand of secrets clue; ooze psychic-crushes anyone approaching.

rooms.label: 23c
rooms.name: Goblin Den

monsters.name: Goblin
monsters.note: asleep unless the post is alerted

rooms.gm_note: If the bugbears die, these goblins flee to 28 via 24 and 25.
